title: A Streetcar Named Desire
creator: Tennessee Williams
description: A fragile woman arrives in New Orleans and disrupts her sister’s marriage.
whyForActors: Sensual, volatile, and full of longing.

title: Hamlet
creator: William Shakespeare
description: A prince returns home to grief, betrayal, and revenge.
whyForActors: A timeless play about thought, grief, delay, and action.

title: The Seagull
creator: Anton Chekhov
description: Artists, lovers, and families circle each other by a country lake.
whyForActors: Melancholic, funny, and full of aching human contradiction.

title: Top Girls
creator: Caryl Churchill
description: A woman’s professional success collides with history, class, and sacrifice.

title: The Cherry Orchard
creator: Anton Chekhov
description: A family estate is sold as an old world quietly disappears.
